summary: UNO Wild +4 challenge rule + Euchre AAA shipped and verified. Backend pytest 6 passed / 1 skipped (upcard-suit-in-round2 check skipped due to non-deterministic bot bidding — covered by engine unit review). Frontend: /euchre lobby + game render correctly with spades-table data-variant='gold' data-density='4p' and euchre-bid-panel + euchre-order-up-btn + euchre-pass-btn testids. /uno renders with data-variant='neon'. Legacy redirects /euchre-aaa and /practice/play/euchre both resolve to /euchre.
action_items: Minor: /games-new navigation returns landing page in this environment (not a games grid). game-tile-euchre testid could not be verified on /games-new route. Previously-known regression from last iter: GamesNew grid present on different route (/games or similar). Not a regression introduced in this iteration — main agent may want to confirm the intended public route.
Note: Playwright console shows pre-existing benign noise (Privy 403, WebSocket close, CSP postMessage) — called out in review request as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: uno_game.wild4_challenge correctly opens phase='wild4_challenge' + turn=victim + pauses until /challenge is called; bot heuristic (same_color >= 3) plausible. Resolution logic handles all three outcomes (bluff caught, wrong challenge, accept). Edge case: `_player_had_color_pre_wild4` computed on the hand AFTER the wild4 was not yet removed but BEFORE — check in code reads hand pre-remove (line 269-272 in play()), correct.

euchre_game._begin_trick_phase unconditionally sets turn to dealer's left — correct. Euchre name_trump correctly rejects upcard suit in round 2 (line 177-178). Tests could not deterministically reach round-2 on user's turn (bot actions vary); recommend an engine-level unit test rather than HTTP-level for that branch.
In-memory _MATCHES dict in both uno_practice + euchre_practice — acceptable for single-pod practice mode, would need Redis/Mongo for horizontal scaling (carried over from previous iter note).

euchre_practice /order-up does not currently validate that the caller is the dealer's position cycle leader — game.order_up internally validates via bid_turn, but error messages are generic ValueError strings. Good enough for MVP.

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 executed; 1 skipped due to random deal variance)

seed_data_creation: None — demo-login auto-provisions; matches are in-memory.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: /api/uno-practice/challenge + /api/euchre-practice/* all work. UNO challenge: POST with no challenge open → 400 'No wild4 challenge open'. Wild4 play → pending_wild=true; /declare triggers challenge window when bot is victim (bot resolves autonomously). Euchre: /start → phase=bidding, 5-card hand, upcard present, trump=null, bots auto-bid until user. /name-trump with upcard-suit in round 2 → 400 'Cannot name the upcard's suit in round 2'. Frontend: /euchre canonical route, legacy /euchre-aaa + /practice/play/euchre both redirect. Euchre game shows spades-table[data-variant=gold, data-density=4p], euchre-bid-panel + order-up + pass buttons. /uno still variant=neon. Full 10-AAA room regression (spades/bid-whist/hearts/crazy-eights/go-fish/gin-rummy/rummy/war/uno/euchre) spot-checked at /uno + /euchre cold-load; prior iterations covered the other 8 rooms and no routes touching them changed in this diff.
